officialSourceName: Instituto Municipal de Deportes de Sevilla official race page
notes: Manually traced 5K route based on the official street-by-street description and linked course PDF on the IMD page. The official page lists the 5K start as approximately 09:30, but the actual departure is organizer-controlled once the tail of the 10K clears the intermediate point, so the live start may slip by a few minutes.
